vuln_q_0081_0002.title: Accepting unknown SSH host keys when using Paramiko
vuln_q_0081_0002.description: Setting missing host key policy to AutoAddPolicy may be unsafe.

vuln_q_0039_0001.title: Binding a socket to all network interfaces
vuln_q_0039_0001.description: '0.0.0.0' binds a socket to all interfaces.

vuln_q_0045_0002.description: This expression logs [sensitive data (password)](1) as clear text.

vuln_q_0014_0004.description: Cross-site scripting vulnerability due to a [user-provided value](1).

vuln_q_0014_0004.description: This log entry depends on a [user-provided value](1).

vuln_q_0069_0000.title: Use of a broken or weak cryptographic algorithm
vuln_q_0069_0000.description: [The cryptographic algorithm DES](1) is broken or weak, and should not be used.
